questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: With reference to the Zojila Tunnel project, which of the following statements is correct?

options.text: It is designed to be the longest uni-directional tunnel in the Indian subcontinent.
Upon completion, it will be the longest bi-directional tunnel in Asia.
The project aims to provide all-weather connectivity between the Drass Valley and the Nubra Valley.
It is the first tunnel in India to be constructed at an elevation exceeding 4,000 meters.

questions.explanation: According to the source material, the Zojila tunnel project, launched in 2018, will be the longest bi-directional tunnel in Asia upon completion. Option A is incorrect because it is bi-directional, not uni-directional. Option C is incorrect as it connects Ladakh and Kashmir (specifically Kashmir and Drass valleys). Option D is incorrect as the elevation of the pass itself is approximately 3,528 meters.
questions.takeaway: The Zojila Tunnel is distinguished by its scale as the longest bi-directional tunnel in Asia.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: In 2018, the Zojila tunnel project was launched. When completed, it will be the longest bi-directional in Asia.
